name: useTranslation
description: A wrapper hook around react-i18next for internationalization with optional placeholder mode for development.
usage_guidelines: Use for translating UI text in components.
Enable placeholder mode during development to use fallback text.
Access translation function via returned 't' method.
Provide translation keys and fallback values.

params.name: usePlaceholder
params.description: If true, returns placeholder translation function using fallback values.

return_value.description: Translation object from react-i18next or placeholder version.

t.description: Translation function that returns translated text or fallback.

Dont: Don't forget to add translations for new keys
Don't use placeholder mode in production
